generated_comment: Seriously yaar, Suman got promoted to Senior PM? Matlab, uski team ke numbers toh average hi the last two quarters. Pata nahi kaise manage kar leti hai ye log. Must be some management's 'diversity' push.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment is misogynistic as it undermines a woman's promotion by attributing it to 'diversity push' (affirmative action) rather than merit, despite her team's performance being 'average', implying she didn't deserve it purely on skill. This encodes the 'Merit undermining' surface manifestation.
original_frame: Misogyny Jokes: Period, Hormones and Mood.
persona_text: You are Ankit. Age 29. A software developer in Pune. You are in a private WhatsApp chat with your two closest male colleagues after your female team lead snapped at someone in today's standup meeting. You are commenting on she reacted that way due to periods.
